Class DataManager

java.lang.Object
data.DataManager
public class DataManager extends Object
Handles all file-based data persistence for the Personal Budgeting System.

Uses Java Serialization to save and load lists of objects to/from .dat files. Acts as the centralized database manager for the application.

      the User, or null if not found
